limitations: The source paper used a three-year ET34-X-V80 analysis. This 30-day fit is a declared reproduction limitation, not an equivalent detiding method.
LoadDef PREM/CE replaces the paper's SPOTL Gutenberg-Bullen response.
Observation correlation and RMS reduction remain unclassified without authenticated iGrav Level 1 data.

published_model_target_comparison.comparison_sign_convention: paper gravity increase positive downward divided by vertical displacement positive upward; project geodetic-up elastic acceleration is negated only at this comparison boundary

published_observation_context.source: Voigt et al. 2024 section 3.3: observed iGrav047 and HELG extrema at 2022-01-30 05:00 UTC
